heading: European Union (EU)
body:
Atlas and [Flex Consulting](flex-consulting) charge
VAT (Value Added Tax) unless you provide a valid `VAT ID Number`. To avoid VAT (Value Added Tax) charges,
include a valid `VAT ID Number` on your [default recipients for billing alerts](atlas-billing-profile).

> **Important:** If your billing address is in Ireland, Atlas and Flex Consulting
> always charge VAT (Value Added Tax), even with a valid `VAT ID Number`.
